tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with blue glaze finish. Perfect for modern bathrooms and kitchens, this tile brings a calm oceanic feel to any space.
tiles.creator: ArtisanCraft Studio
tiles.style: Contemporary oceanic design with uniform glaze and subtle texture variations that catch light beautifully.

tiles.title: Marble Ivory Classic
tiles.description: Elegant marble-effect tile with ivory and gold veining. Brings timeless luxury to living rooms and foyers.
tiles.creator: LuxeTile Works
tiles.style: Timeless luxury aesthetic inspired by Italian marble quarries with rich vein patterns.

tiles.title: Geometric Terracotta
tiles.description: Handcrafted terracotta tile with geometric patterns. Earthy tones with a Mediterranean soul.
tiles.creator: MediterraDesigns
tiles.style: Rustic Mediterranean geometric pattern with warm earthy tones hand-pressed into terracotta clay.

tiles.title: Midnight Slate Mosaic
tiles.description: Dark slate mosaic tiles with subtle shimmer. Creates dramatic feature walls and flooring.
tiles.creator: DarkMatter Tiles
tiles.style: Bold dramatic aesthetic with natural slate cleft surfaces creating rich textural depth.

tiles.title: Sage Green Subway
tiles.description: Smooth sage green subway tile with matte finish. Clean lines meet calming tones for the perfect modern kitchen backsplash.
tiles.creator: UrbanGlaze Co.
tiles.style: Refined minimalist design with soft matte finish that absorbs light for a calm, sophisticated look.

tiles.title: Zellige Cobalt
tiles.description: Hand-cut Moroccan zellige tiles in deep cobalt blue. Each piece is unique with natural imperfections that create organic beauty.
tiles.creator: Fez Artisan Guild
tiles.style: Traditional Moroccan craft with hand-cut irregular edges and rich glazed surfaces full of natural character.

tiles.title: White Hexagon Marble
tiles.description: Classic white marble hexagon tiles. The timeless honeycomb pattern adds geometric interest to any bathroom floor.
tiles.creator: Carrara House
tiles.style: Geometric elegance from Italian Carrara marble, shaped into honeycomb patterns for timeless sophistication.

tiles.title: Rustic Wood Plank
tiles.description: Porcelain tile that perfectly mimics reclaimed wood planks. Get the warmth of wood with the durability of tile.
tiles.creator: NaturalMimic Studios
tiles.style: Photorealistic wood grain texture printed on high-density porcelain for authentic warmth without maintenance.

tiles.title: Art Deco Gold Finish
tiles.description: Opulent Art Deco inspired tile with gold geometric accents. Perfect for glamorous powder rooms and statement walls.
tiles.creator: Gatsby Tile House
tiles.style: 1920s Art Deco revival with geometric gold inlay patterns inspired by the Jazz Age opulence.

tiles.title: Cement Patchwork Grey
tiles.description: Handmade cement tiles with patchwork grey pattern. Industrial meets artisan in this versatile design.
tiles.creator: Loft Craft Co.
tiles.style: Urban industrial aesthetic with handpoured cement and natural pigments creating unique tonal variations.

tiles.title: Coral Pink Gloss
tiles.description: Vibrant coral pink glossy tiles that bring energy and warmth. A bold choice for feature walls and creative spaces.
tiles.creator: ColorPop Tiles
tiles.style: Maximalist color statement with high-gloss finish that amplifies light and creates joyful atmosphere.

tiles.title: Concrete Loft Series
tiles.description: Ultra-realistic large format concrete-look tiles. Sleek, industrial, and incredibly versatile for contemporary spaces.
tiles.creator: Brutalist Surfaces
tiles.style: Raw brutalist aesthetic with precise surface texture reproduction for authentic urban living spaces.
